items.content: Gold markets on a roller coaster: Gold recovers to $4,630/oz after 1.6% dip. Axios reports talks of a 45-day ceasefire. Trump maintains threats of escalation in Iran.
items.author: @rkjat65

items.content: WSJ confirms Iran has rejected the US proposal for a temporary ceasefire in the Strait of Hormuz. Trump busted lying again! Pakistan, Turkey, Egypt intermediaries trying but Iran refuses.
items.author: @Truthtellerftm

items.content: If I were Iran I wouldn't accept any ceasefire. Iran has already lost everything, so what more can it lose?
items.author: @HawiyeIyoDir

items.content: Axios: In last-ditch push, US, Iran and regional mediators discussing terms for potential 45-day ceasefire that could lead to permanent end to war (4 US, Israeli, regional sources). Story by Barak Ravid.
items.author: @BarakRavid via @TheArabEye0

items.content: Why every time Trump gives Iran a 48-HOUR deadline, headlines of a CEASEFIRE begin to circulate?
items.author: @TheArabEye0

items.content: JUST IN: Brent crude oil falls after reports US and Iran discussing a 45-day ceasefire that could permanently end the war.
items.author: @WatcherGuru

items.content: JUST IN: $69,000 Bitcoin. $100,000,000 worth of crypto shorts liquidated in the past 90 minutes.
items.author: @WatcherGuru

items.content: Gold fell after Trump renewed threats to destroy Iran's power plants and Tehran showed little sign of accepting American demands to end the war in the Middle East.
items.author: @business

timeline.content: Brent crude oil FALLS after reports US and Iran discussing 45-day ceasefire → 170K views, 2.2K likes
Axios: US, Iran, regional mediators in last-ditch push for 45-day ceasefire terms → permanent end possible
WSJ confirms Iran REJECTS US temporary ceasefire proposal in Strait of Hormuz. Pakistan/Turkey/Egypt mediators rejected.
Gold $4,630/oz recovering from 1.6% dip; ceasefire speculation vs escalation threats creating volatility
Trump renewed threats to destroy Iran's power plants; Tehran showed little sign of accepting US demands

key_developments.headline: 45-Day Ceasefire Talks + Iran Rejection = Contradictory Signals
bullish_signals: US and Iran reportedly discussing 45-day ceasefire terms (Axios/WatcherGuru)
Brent crude oil FALLS on ceasefire speculation
Gold dips 1.6% then recovers - risk-on recovery
Regional mediators still active (Pakistan, Turkey, Egypt, Qatar/Doha/Istanbul)
bearish_signals: WSJ confirms Iran rejected US ceasefire proposal in Strait of Hormuz
Trump: 'No it's war' on F-15E shootdown impact question
Iran Parliament Speaker: downgraded from regime change to 'can anyone find our pilots?' (ironic)
US purging generals opposed to ground war
Middle East oil exports -63%, jet fuel -85%

market_impact.oil: Brent crude fell on ceasefire hopes (previously hit $109+/bbl)
market_impact.equities: Hedge funds sold world equities at fastest pace in 10 years in March
market_impact.cds: CDS volume +69% Q1 2026 to $4.5T - record high
